name: Carlisle Acacia Coffee Table: Modern Industrial Style, Water-Resistant - Christopher Knight Home
description:
Accentuate your outdoor space with an upscale modern industrial vibe. Our impressive coffee table features a rich acacia wood structure and powder-coated metal frame to boost the way you utilize your lounge space. With a beautiful slat panel tabletop, this accessory can be used to complement any patio or backyard. Finished with a classic H-stretcher, this table will allow you to easily enjoy a warm sunny day outdoors with a glass of lemonade and a bowl of your favorite snacks.

MODERN INDUSTRIAL: Our coffee table incorporates a powder-coated frame with rich acacia wood to create an understated modern industrial design. Featuring sleek slat paneling, this table offers a chic aesthetic to any home.

ACACIA WOOD: Made with acacia wood that brings a sleek and exotic look to your space, this durable hardwood naturally withstands outdoor elements and will not darken over time. Acacia wood is perfect as a solid, heavy frame that resists wear and tear.

SLAT PANEL DESIGN: The tabletop features beautiful slat paneling, giving this set a sophisticated, classic look. This perfectly complements the powder-coated metal frame, giving this piece a raw industrial feel to your decor.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This coffee table is 45.75" W x 24.00" D x 18.00" H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming table.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this coffee table. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included.
